task_description: find all directories containing more than 100 files
code: find . -type d -exec sh -c 'files=$(find "{}" -type f | wc -l); if [ "$files" -gt 100 ]; then echo "$files {}"; fi' \;

messages.content:
```bash
find . -type d -exec sh -c 'echo "$(find "{}" -type f | wc -l) {}"' \; | sort -nr | head -20
```
